mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN A.skind_cd = 'KORNET' THEN B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD ELSE C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD END SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , CASE WHEN A.skind_cd = 'KORNET' THEN B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM ELSE C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM END SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , CASE WHEN A.skind_cd = 'KORNET' THEN B.SSVC_GROUP_CD ELSE C.SSVC_GROUP_CD END SSVC_GROUP_CD , CASE WHEN A.skind_cd = 'KORNET' THEN B.SSVC_GROUP_NM ELSE C.SSVC_GROUP_NM END SSVC_GROUP_NM , CASE WHEN A.skind_cd = 'KORNET' THEN B.SSVC_OBJ_CD ELSE C.SSVC_OBJ_CD END SSVC_OBJ_CD , CASE WHEN A.skind_cd = 'KORNET' THEN B.SSVC_OBJ_NM ELSE C.SSVC_OBJ_NM END SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.NWIRE_IP_COMMU_SEQ , A.SKIND_CD , A.SCOMMUNITY , A.SNEXTHOP , A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ , A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID FROM MST.TB_WIRE_IP_COMMU_MST A, (SELECT A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , B.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , C.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM FROM MST.TB_LVL_BAS A , MST.TB_LVL_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_CD C , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD D WHERE 1=1 AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'CL0001' AND A.SSVC_GROUP_CD = B.SLVL_CD AND A.SSVC_OBJ_CD = C.SLVL_CD AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD) B, (SELECT A.NLVL_MST_SEQ , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , B.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , C.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM FROM MST.TB_LVL_MST A , MST.TB_LVL_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_CD C , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD D WHERE 1=1 AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'CL0002' AND A.SSVC_GROUP_CD = B.SLVL_CD AND A.SSVC_OBJ_CD = C.SLVL_CD AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD ) C WHERE 1=1 AND A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ = B.NLVL_BAS_SEQ(+) AND A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ = C.NLVL_MST_SEQ(+) AND A.NWIRE_IP_COMMU_SEQ IS NOT NULL AND A.NWIRE_IP_COMMU_SEQ = #{nwireIpCommuSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MST.TB_WIRE_IP_COMMU_MST ( SKIND_CD, SCOMMUNITY, SNEXTHOP, NLVL_BAS_SEQ, DCREATE_DT, SCREATE_ID, DMODIFY_DT, SMODIFY_ID ) VALUES ( #{skindCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scommunity, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{snexthop, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nlvlBasSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SYSDATE, #{screateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{smodifyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE MST.TB_WIRE_IP_COMMU_MST SET
SCOMMUNITY = #{scommunity, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SNEXTHOP = #{snexthop, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,
DMODIFY_DT = SYSDATE, SMODIFY_ID = #{smodifyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE NWIRE_IP_COMMU_SEQ = #{nwireIpCommuSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , C.SLVL_NM SSVC_GROUP_NM , D.SLVL_NM SSVC_OBJ_NM , E.NWIRE_IP_COMMU_SEQ , E.SKIND_CD , E.SCOMMUNITY , E.SNEXTHOP , E.NLVL_BAS_SEQ , E.DCREATE_DT , E.SCREATE_ID , E.DMODIFY_DT , E.SMODIFY_ID FROM MST.TB_LVL_BAS A , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_CD C , MST.TB_LVL_CD D , MST.TB_WIRE_IP_COMMU_MST E -- 조직별 장비 MST WHERE 1=1 AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD IN ('CL0001', 'CL0002', 'CL0003') AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_GROUP_CD = C.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_OBJ_CD = D.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ = E.NLVL_BAS_SEQ(+) AND E.NWIRE_IP_COMMU_SEQ IS NOT NULL
